# Environment Notes

Use this file as the human-readable lab notebook for setup decisions.

Suggested entries:

- Conda env names for MFA, DiffSinger, MakeDiffSinger, and SOME
- OS and shell details
- GPU or CPU-only notes
- Known-good commands for training, inference, and dataset preprocessing
- Any fixes needed to get a tool running on this machine

Recommended habit:

When something finally works, write down the exact command and where it was run from before moving on.
